purpose: Framework-specific adapter plans for turning Kabeeri tokens and screen compositions into implementation guidance.

imports: import 'bootstrap/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js'; only when Bootstrap JS plugins are used
adapters.icon_strategy: Use Bootstrap Icons when available, otherwise document the selected icon library for the surface.
token_mapping: Map semantic colors to Bootstrap theme variables and CSS custom properties.
Map radius and shadows through central theme CSS.
Use Bootstrap spacing utilities before custom CSS.
warnings: Avoid writing custom components when Bootstrap has an approved component.
Do not load bootstrap.bundle if no Bootstrap JavaScript plugins are used.

imports: Document the Tailwind build adapter: CLI, Vite, PostCSS, or framework plugin.
Import the generated CSS bundle from the app entrypoint.
adapters.icon_strategy: Use Lucide or Tabler consistently unless the project already has an approved icon source.
token_mapping: Expose Kabeeri tokens as CSS variables.
Use Tailwind utilities that reference semantic variables.
Create repeated component recipes to avoid ad hoc utility strings.

component_map.layout_shell: grid, flex, container, gap, responsive utilities
component_map.button: project button recipe using semantic variables
component_map.card: rounded border bg-surface shadow token recipe
component_map.table: responsive wrapper plus table density recipe
component_map.modal: dialog primitive or project overlay component

warnings: Do not paste long utility strings repeatedly; create component contracts.

adapters.icon_strategy: Use the project-approved icon library with Bulma buttons and controls.
token_mapping: Map Bulma CSS variables/Sass variables to Kabeeri tokens.
Use Bulma helpers before custom layout CSS.
warnings: Bulma is CSS-only; JavaScript behavior needs project contracts.

imports: Import Foundation CSS or Sass settings.
Initialize Foundation JavaScript plugins only when used.
adapters.icon_strategy: Use the project-approved icon library; Foundation does not define the icon system.
token_mapping: Map Sass settings to Kabeeri tokens.
Keep token overrides centralized.
warnings: Do not mix with another full CSS framework without a migration decision.

imports: Wrap the app in MUI ThemeProvider.
Document Emotion/SSR setup for the selected framework.
adapters.icon_strategy: Use MUI Icons only if approved; otherwise use one project icon source inside MUI buttons.
token_mapping: Map Kabeeri colors to palette.
Map spacing to theme spacing.
Map radius to shape.borderRadius.
Define component variants centrally.

component_map.table: Table or Data Grid when approved

warnings: Do not bypass theme tokens with raw sx colors.

imports: Document locale, direction, and theme token setup.
adapters.icon_strategy: Use Ant Design Icons or the project-approved icon set consistently.
token_mapping: Map Kabeeri tokens through ConfigProvider theme tokens.
Set density through component size and table configuration.
Centralize status colors and aliases.

component_map.layout_shell: Layout, Sider, Header, Content, Space, Flex
component_map.table: Table with filters, sorters, pagination, rowSelection

warnings: Document table density, column visibility, and keyboard expectations for data-heavy pages.

imports: Configure daisyUI in the Tailwind setup.
Document the selected daisyUI theme and token overrides.
adapters.icon_strategy: Use Lucide or Tabler consistently inside daisyUI components.
token_mapping: Map Kabeeri semantic colors into a daisyUI theme.
Use daisyUI component classes before writing custom recipes.
warnings: Avoid mixing daisyUI and shadcn/ui components on the same surface without an ownership rule.

imports: Initialize shadcn/ui for the selected framework.
Document copied components and ownership path.
adapters.icon_strategy: Use Lucide icons unless project policy selects another source.
token_mapping: Map Kabeeri tokens to CSS variables.
Use Tailwind variables consumed by shadcn components.
Edit owned component variants centrally.

component_map.layout_shell: App shell with Tailwind grid/flex and owned layout components

warnings: shadcn/ui copies source into the app; track component ownership and modifications.
